creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to gergely.czuczy from comment #14)

Ah, in that case, your best bet is honestly going to be to just grab a stable/13 snapshot and cherry-pick /usr/lib/libprivateevent1* from it -- as kp pointed out, there's been no activity except for mine, so this one will effectively have 13.0 + my patch: https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/amd64/amd64/13.0-STABLE/base.txz -> no need to rebuild ftp-proxy, just plop libprivatevent1 bits in there and restart ftp-proxy to test it. Perhaps make a backup of your existing libprivateevent1* to be safe.
